Headline: #95 95th Temporary Westbound Reroute near Western/93rd
ShortDescription: WB 95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 95th, Ashland, 87th, Damen, and over regular route: due to, street blockage near Western/93rd.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 95th, Ashland, 87th, Damen, and over regular route: due to, street blockage near Western/93rd.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
